title: horkelia californica var. elata
intro: Horkelia californica var. elata, also known as tall horkelia, is a perennial herb belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae) and native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of horkelia californica var. elata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include making infusions or decoctions from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as a poultice or salve.
